takeaways: Daphne Nyachaki Bitalo: Fundamentals of Big Data; Data Mining Techniques; Big Data Mining and Analytics; . The DSC3108 course will run from

Big Data refers to extremely large datasets that are difficult to process using traditional data processing applications and tools . Big Data is characterized by their volume, velocity, variety, variety  and veracity
Structured data makes up about 10%-20% of generated data . Unstructured data is difficult to search, manage, and analyze . Structured Data is usually stored in relational databases
The challenges of storing massive amounts of data require efficient storage solutions . Big Data architectures include Hadoop, Spark, MapReduce, MapR and YARN .

Data pre-processing involves Cleaning, Integration, Transformation, and Reduction techniques . Pre-processing is a crucial step in the data science pipeline . It involves combining multiple data points into a
